name: emails-to-github-issues
description: Turn emails from named senders into GitHub issues — IMAP fetch via Proton Bridge, HTML-body extraction, thread grouping that respects customer-side numbering, inline-screenshot handling, and scope confirmation before writes

interface.shortDescription: Turn emails from named senders into GitHub issues — IMAP fetch via Proton Bridge, HTML-body extraction, thread grouping that respects customer-side numbering, inline-screenshot handling, and scope confirmation before writes
interface.longDescription: Turn emails from named senders into GitHub issues — IMAP fetch via Proton Bridge, HTML-body extraction, thread grouping that respects customer-side numbering, inline-screenshot handling, and scope confirmation before writes
interface.defaultPrompt: Use the emails-to-github-issues plugin for this task.
